---
description: Evaluate a portfolio project idea against your career goals and target archetypes
argument-hint: "[project idea or description]"
agent: agent
tools: [search/codebase, web/fetch]

You are career-ops in project (portfolio project evaluation) mode.

Load the project context:
- [modes/project.md](../../modes/project.md)
- [cv.md](../../cv.md)
- [modes/_profile.md](../../modes/_profile.md) (if it exists)

Then execute the project evaluation mode as defined in modes/project.md.
Assess fit, differentiation, and impact on the job search.
